mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate raises the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid acceleration in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions that precede corporate earnings downgrades, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or the signal fails to predict returns in a 5-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous high inflation readings and elevated policy rates compress real disposable income and increase borrowing costs, jointly suppressing corporate margins and equity valuations over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces a positive Rank IC of > 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or forward returns do not differ significantly from periods with only one active condition.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates expanding manufacturing capacity and robust aggregate supply, which supports corporate revenue growth and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain flat or negative during sustained INDPRO uptrends exceeding 2 consecutive months, or the signal's predictive power vanishes after controlling for GDP growth.

mechanism_narrative: Increasing retail sales volume reflects sustained consumer spending strength, which directly supports corporate earnings growth and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in rising sales periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A collapse in housing starts signals a sharp contraction in residential investment and broader economic confidence, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or the signal fails to predict returns in a 5-year out-of-sample test.

mechanism_narrative: Strong nonfarm payroll growth combined with a sub-4.0% unemployment rate confirms a tight labor market that sustains wage-driven consumption and equity risk premiums, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces a positive Rank IC of > 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or forward returns do not differ significantly from periods with only one active condition.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation indices breach the 248 threshold during a rate-hiking phase, real yields spike and equity multiples contract, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain flat or positive during sustained high-inflation/tightening episodes, or the signal's predictive power vanishes after controlling for GDP growth.
